question: What text appears on the grey lower-third graphic describing the speaker's title? A. JOHN CORREIA B. NEW DETAILS C. PROFESSOR OF DEFENSE AGAINST THE DARK ARTS D. ACTIVE SELF
What number is included in the news channel logo visible in the inset video?
What is the color of the short-sleeved polo shirt worn by the man? A. Black B. White C. Red D. Grey
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with dark hair and a full beard wears a white polo shirt with a black logo on the left chest. He gestures with both hands in front of his chest. An inset video screen displays a convenience store interior with shelves and refrigerators. News graphics overlay the inset video with text reading "SPANAWAY" and "KIRO 7". A red lower-third graphic identifies the speaker as John Correia.

Describe the visual sequence involving the host, the logo animation, and the return to the host with on-screen graphics.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a white polo shirt gestures while speaking; at 10s, a 3D metallic logo appears on a black background; at 14s, the metallic logo rotates to face the camera directly; at 16s, the man reappears alongside a red lower-third graphic and an inset video screen showing a convenience store.
